Institutional Layer

Privacy Policy

SingaporeCommodities.com operates under a principle of minimal data surface.

Section

Privacy Policy

Route

/privacy/

Extended Content

Full text

Privacy Policy

SingaporeCommodities.com operates under a principle of minimal data surface.

We do not build value through user surveillance, profiling, or data extraction.
The platform is designed as a knowledge infrastructure, not a data-harvesting system.

Data Collection

We collect only what is strictly necessary for: - Platform stability and security - Aggregate traffic understanding - Performance monitoring

This may include: - Anonymous usage data - Basic request logs - Non-identifiable behavioral signals

No personal profiling is conducted.

Cookies

If used, cookies are strictly: - Functional (site performance) - Analytical (aggregate, non-identifiable)

No third-party advertising trackers are embedded.

Data Usage

Collected data is used exclusively to: - Improve site performance - Maintain system reliability - Understand structural usage patterns

It is not sold, traded, or shared for commercial targeting.

External Services

Where analytics tools are used, they are configured to: - Minimize tracking - Avoid personal identification - Respect jurisdictional privacy standards

Philosophy

This platform is built on a simple premise:

Trust is not declared. It is engineered.

SingaporeCommodities.com prioritizes structural trust over extractive growth models.

Contact

For privacy-related inquiries: Contact: agent@sohadot.com

Singapore Commodities

A sovereign-grade reference platform interpreting Singapore’s role in commodity power through maritime systems, energy transition, trade coordination, finance, logistics, and strategic intelligence.
